• NOTE: Deviations from these recommended combinations require option code (D30) Color Combination Override at an additional charge.

1. (AH2) GT2 seats are available with (TU7) two-tone seats option.  Seats are Jet Black when (AE4) Competition seats are ordered.
2. (AH2) GT2 seats are available with (TU7) two-tone seats option.
3. Full color interior (instrument panel, doors and carpet).
4. Full color interior (instrument panel, doors and carpet). This interior features light color throughout and may require extra care to avoid soiling. Certain lighting conditions may cause a noticeable reflection on the inside of the windshield.
5. Requires (N26) sueded microfiber-wrapped steering wheel.
6. (AH2) GT2 bucket seats require (TU7) two-tone seats.
7. Requires (N26) sueded microfiber-wrapped steering wheel on Stingray and Grand Sport models; Requires (N2Z) carbon fiber and sueded microfiber-wrapped steering wheel on Z06, ZR1 and ZR1X models.
8. Included and only available with (Z25) Grand Sport Launch Edition.
9. Additional charge - premium tintcoat color.
10. Additional charge - premium color.

• Requires option code (R6X) Custom Interior Trim and Seat Combination at an additional charge. If option (D30) Color Combination Override is also selected, only one charge will apply.

1. Requires (38S) Adrenaline Red custom leather stitch.
2. Requires (N26) sueded microfiber-wrapped steering wheel on Stingray and Grand Sport models; Requires (N2Z) carbon fiber and sueded microfiber-wrapped steering wheel on Z06, ZR1 and ZR1X models.
3. Requires (38S) Adrenaline Red custom leather stitch. (AH2) GT2 bucket seats require (TU7) two-tone seats.
4. Additional charge - premium tintcoat color.
5. Additional charge - premium color.
